title: UN Comtrade Merchandise Trade Database

access_methods.notes: Official UNSD methodology and classification inventory.
Official record layout for trade data fields.
Official about page for the UN Comtrade explorer.
Official UNSD API catalogue linking to the UN Comtrade API portal.
Official UN Comtrade API portal URL referenced by the UNSD API catalogue.
Tested on 2026-04-22. In this environment the endpoint returned the Comtrade web application shell as HTML rather than raw JSON, so it is not yet accepted here as a verified raw download endpoint.

access_conditions: UNSD documents public API-based dissemination for UN Comtrade.
A stable raw dataset endpoint was not verified in this session from the current live Comtradeplus interface.
limitations: The current manifest documents official API references and a tested current endpoint candidate, but no raw file was downloaded on 2026-04-22.
The historically documented API routes observed in UNSD sources appear to have changed, and the tested live candidate returned HTML rather than machine-readable trade records in this environment.
